allow: Bash(node -e "const w = require\('./node_modules/webpack/package.json'\); const wds = require\('./node_modules/webpack-dev-server/package.json'\); console.log\('webpack:', w.version, '\\nwebpack-dev-server:', wds.version\);")

Bash(node -e "const d = require\('./node_modules/@docusaurus/core/package.json'\); console.log\('wds peer:', d.peerDependencies && d.peerDependencies['webpack-dev-server']\); console.log\('webpack dep:', d.dependencies && d.dependencies['webpack']\); console.log\('wds dep:', d.dependencies && d.dependencies['webpack-dev-server']\);")
